text: Best Fertility And IVF Hospital in Bangalore | Best Fertility Clinic Skip to content About Us Services Obstetrics Pregnancy Care Fetal Assessment Prenatal Care and Assessment High-Risk Pregnancy Reproductive Endocrinology Breastfeeding Support Counselling Therapy Gynaecology Abnormal Uterine Bleeding Adenomyosis Fallen Bladder Cervical Dysplasia Endometriosis Ovarian Cysts Menopause Family Planning Services Infertility Treatment Ovulation Induction Facilities Contact us X Book an Appointment 79756 97629 s Best Fertility Hospital in Bangalore A safe space for women's health and healing Nandini women’s clinic in Bangalore is not just a medical facility but a nurturing and empowering environment for women of all ages. Our approach to healthcare is unique, as we strive to integrate traditional and modern medical practices to provide holistic care to our patients. We are committed to creating a safe and comfortable space where women can openly discuss their concerns and receive personalised care. Our team of skilled doctors and healthcare professionals is dedicated to staying up-to-date with the latest advancements in women’s health to provide the best care possible. We are passionate about empowering women to take control of their health and lead fulfilling lives. Gynaecology Join us on the journey to optimal health and experience the difference in women's quality care designed to meet your unique needs. Infertility Treatments Unlock the door to motherhood with our innovative infertility solutions and expertise for your fertility journey. Your guide through pregnancy Expert advice from conception to delivery First Trimester Second Trimester Third Trimester First Trimester WEEK 1 – 4 : The sex of your baby has already been decided WEEK 4 – 9 : You might feel some pregnancy symptoms at four weeks WEEK 9 – 13 : Your baby is now 6 cm in length and fully formed Second Trimester WEEK 13 – 18 : Baby’s lower limbs are now well-developed WEEK 18 – 22 : Baby-to-be is adding fat tissue and gaining weight WEEK 22 – 27 : Your baby is now 6cm in length and fully formed Third Trimester WEEK 27 – 31 : Baby’s eyes are opening and it is gaining weight WEEK 31 – 36 : Your baby is getting more plump each day WEEK 36 – 40 : Delivery day is coming soon! First Trimester WEEK 1 – 4 : The sex of your baby has already been decided WEEK 4 – 9 : You might feel some pregnancy symptoms at four weeks WEEK 9 – 13 : Your baby is now 6 cm in length and fully formed Second Trimester WEEK 13 – 18 : Baby’s lower limbs are now well-developed WEEK 18 – 22 : Baby-to-be is adding fat tissue and gaining weight WEEK 22 – 27 : Your baby will be moving quite a bit by now Third Trimester WEEK 27 – 31 : Baby’s eyes are opening and it is gaining weight WEEK 31 – 36 : Your baby is getting more plump each day WEEK 36 – 40: Delivery day is coming soon! Visionary Leader Redefining and shaping the future of women's health At the vanguard of women’s health, Dr Nandini M Hadalagi is tirelessly shaping its future through innovative breakthroughs and an unyielding commitment. Her pioneering contributions and exceptional expertise are forging a path toward improved well-being and a brighter horizon for women worldwide. She has been honored as the Emerging Obstetrician by the Times Health Excellence Award 2024 for her exceptional contributions to women’s healthcare. Her dedication to providing compassionate and comprehensive obstetric and gynecological care continues to make a lasting impact.
